headline: Dollar General adopts Costco-style store strategy
summary: Dollar General wants to be more than just a cheap place to buy groceries and household staples. The retailer has invested heavily in improving its stores. That's perhaps not a direct response to a 2024 episode of “Last Week Tonight,” in which John Oliver highlighted the many problems in its stores, ...

headline: Will Dollar General (DG) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Dollar General (DG) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Assessing Dollar General (DG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Dollar General (DG) has drawn investor interest as its stock fell about 18% over the past month and about 32% over the past 3 months, despite reporting annual revenue of US$42.7b and net income of US$1.5b. See our latest analysis for Dollar General. At a share price of US$103.48, Dollar General’s short term momentum has weakened, with the 30 day share price return down 18.31% and the 90 day share price return down 31.93%, while the 1 year total shareholder return is still 3.31%.
